Issue: HTTP event routing last in chain
Description: handler() if/elif chain checks 8+ non-HTTP event types before reaching HTTP paths (v2 at ~838, v1 at ~908)
Fix: Reorder to check httpMethod and version==2.0 first

Description: run_function() uses reflection to inspect function signature on every invocation; signature never changes at runtime
Fix: Cache result keyed by function identity via lru_cache or instance dict

Description: common_log() calls ApacheNCSAFormatter(with_response_time=True/False) each request, resolving one of two static methods
Fix: Cache both formatters as module-level constants

Description: datetime.datetime.now() creates timezone-aware datetime objects and does arithmetic for elapsed time measurement
Fix: Replace with time.perf_counter() which is monotonic and optimized for intervals

Description: _process_response_body rebuilds handle_as_text_mimetypes tuple via concatenation on each call; settings don't change between requests
Fix: Compute once during __init__ and store on self

Description: merge_headers(event) called in handler() for host/ELB detection, then called again inside create_wsgi_request via process_lambda_payload_v1
Fix: Pass already-merged headers into create_wsgi_request or restructure host/ELB check

Issue: Fake WSGI environ for ASGI logging
Description: _log_asgi_request builds a synthetic WSGI-like environ dict (iterating and decoding all headers) just to pass to common_log
Fix: Create lightweight ASGI-native log function that reads directly from scope

Description: Assigns .data back to .content just so common_log can call len(response.content); _LogResponse namedtuple exists but isn't used here
Fix: Use _LogResponse namedtuple or pass content_length directly to log function

Description: titlecase_keys(headers) creates a full dict copy with title-cased keys for 15-20 headers per request
Fix: Title-case inline during existing header iteration or only when looking up specific keys

Description: boto3 imported unconditionally at module level; HTTP requests never use it. ~50-100ms on first cold start, negligible after
Fix: Lazy-import boto3 inside methods that need it (_get_boto_session / load_remote_*)
